title: Help Rania Cover Her Kidney Cancer Treatment
story: I am Rania Khalil, a 38-year-old mother of two from Dearborn, Michigan. In February 2026 I was diagnosed with Stage III renal cell carcinoma and began an intensive treatment plan at Henry Ford Health that includes partial nephrectomy, immunotherapy infusions, and follow-up imaging. My health insurance covers only 60% of eligible costs, leaving me with over $14,000 in out-of-pocket bills that my family cannot absorb on a single income. Any contribution — large or small — brings my family closer to stability while I focus on healing.
